title: Continuous Internal Evaluation (CIE) Workflow in Computer Vision
description: A flowchart illustrating the cyclical process of Continuous Internal Evaluation for a Computer Vision module, showing how student work is assessed, fed back, and used to improve learning outcomes.
elements: Practical Assignment Submission (e.g., Image Classification, Object Detection)
relationships: Defined learning objectives lead to practical assignments
Submissions are processed for automated evaluation and feedback
Automated results and submissions are reviewed by the instructor for qualitative feedback
Combined evaluation data is analyzed to identify learning gaps
Identified gaps trigger targeted interventions to improve understanding
